the reviewer expresses disappointment because the book did not match their expectations regarding the story content. they believed they were purchasing the famous tale about a deer but found it was actually about a young adult character instead.

despite giving five stars to avoid unfair judgment, the core sentiment is negative due to the confusion and unmet hopes. the user explicitly states they have not read the whole book and feels misled by the title or description, which indicates dissatisfaction with the purchase.
